status: Phase 2.5 clean dashboard data generated with full and web priority layers

fallbacks.recommended_action: Generated class-based fallback where source field is absent.
fallbacks.rediscovery_candidates: Generated conservatively as species-level hypotheses with null location fields.
fallbacks.biome_boundary: Generated from dissolved analysis grid footprint.
fallbacks.priority_cells_alias: priority_cells.geojson is copied from priority_cells_web.geojson for dashboard compatibility.
fallbacks.cell_plant_candidates: Only explicit species + cell_id records are linked to cells.

validation_caveats: No dashboard HTML was edited in Phase 2.5.
No original source data files were overwritten.
State fields are incomplete for cells not present in the existing priority_cells.geojson.
Rediscovery candidates require spatial evidence before being treated as location-specific targets.
Adequate cells are omitted from the default web priority layer but retained in priority_cells_full.geojson.
